What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing a black hat and long-sleeved shirt plays an acoustic guitar while singing into a microphone on a stand, positioned next to a woman with long dark hair and a black hat singing into a handheld microphone. Behind them on the left, another man in a black t-shirt stands behind audio equipment including a keyboard. A banner with text is visible in the background behind the performers.

canonical_answer: At 0s, a man plays an acoustic guitar while a woman sings into a handheld microphone; at 6s, the man continues strumming the guitar as the woman sings beside him; at 12s, the pair perform in front of a sunburst banner; at 18s, the woman begins shaking a tambourine while the man keeps playing the guitar.
